testcase.name: test_subscriptions_have_created_at

failure.message: AssertionError: Subscription missing created_at: 484ed410-d10c-4c27-853e-7d85ab9ca142 assert 'created_at' in {'amount': 699.99, 'cancel_at_period_end': True, 'canceled_at': '2026-02-21T02:35:42.984869+00:00', 'current_period_end': '2026-03-22T23:31:35.781282+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_enhanced_features.py:533: in test_subscriptions_have_created_at assert "created_at" in sub, f"Subscription missing created_at: {sub.get('id')}" E AssertionError: Subscription missing created_at: 484ed410-d10c-4c27-853e-7d85ab9ca142 E assert 'created_at' in {'amount': 699.99, 'cancel_at_period_end': True, 'canceled_at': '2026-02-21T02:35:42.984869+00:00', 'current_period_end': '2026-03-22T23:31:35.781282+00:00', ...}
